controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit certain supervisory returns to the reserve bank as per various directions / circulars/ notifications issued by the bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
All Supervised Entities (SEs) are required to submit certain
supervisory returns to the Reserve Bank as per various directions / circulars/
notifications issued by the Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit certain supervisory returns to the reserve bank as per various directions / circulars/ notifications issued by the bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (filing of supervisory returns) directions - 2024
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Filing
of Supervisory Returns) Directions - 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (filing of supervisory returns) directions - 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the following entities:
controls.control_description: These Directions shall apply to the following entities:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the following entities:

controls.control_objective: To ensure hereafter be referred to as 'supervised entities (ses)' for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
above shall hereafter be referred to as
'Supervised Entities (SEs)' for the purpose of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hereafter be referred to as 'supervised entities (ses)' for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to report data on their domestic and overseas operations, including the operations of ifsc banking units (ibus) and overseas banking units (obus)
controls.control_description:
Commercial Banks and NBFCs shall be required to report data on their domestic
and overseas operations, including the operations of IFSC Banking Units (IBUs) and
Overseas Banking Units (OBUs), wherever applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be required to report data on their domestic and overseas operations, including the operations of ifsc banking units (ibus) and overseas banking units (obus)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of any other instructions / directions issued by the rbi
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of any other
Instructions / Directions issued by the RBI, except for such clauses in the instructions
/ Directions that have been repealed herein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of any other instructions / directions issued by the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them as below: a
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them as below:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them as below: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to as given in rbi's press release no
controls.control_description:
The 'Principal Business' criteria may be referred to as
given in RBI's Press Release No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to as given in rbi's press release no

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as given in rbi's notification dor
controls.control_description:
Base, Middle, Upper and Top Layers NBFCs shall have the same meaning
as given in RBI's notification DoR.FIN.REC.No.45/03.10.119/2023-24 dated
October 19, 2023 (Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Company - Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2023) and
subsequent clarifications thereon.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as given in rbi's notification dor

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or banking regulation act, 1949, or securitisation and
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or Banking
Regulation Act, 1949, or Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and
Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002 or Glossary of Terms published by Reserve
Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or banking regulation act, 1949, or securitisation and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully documented and subject to high standards of validation that are aligned with bank's other independent risk management reviews
controls.control_description:
The risk data aggregation capabilities and risk reporting practices should be
fully documented and subject to high standards of validation that are aligned
with bank's other independent risk management reviews.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully documented and subject to high standards of validation that are aligned with bank's other independent risk management reviews

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted using staff with specific it, data and reporting expertise
controls.control_description:
The validation of
risk data aggregation and risk reporting practices shall be conducted using
staff with specific IT, data and reporting expertise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted using staff with specific it, data and reporting expertise

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that adequate resources are deployed for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Board and senior
management should ensure that adequate resources are deployed for the
purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that adequate resources are deployed for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the identification, assessment, and management of data quality risks as part of its overall risk management framework
controls.control_description:
The Board and senior management shall include the identification,
assessment, and management of data quality risks as part of its overall risk
management framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to include the identification, assessment, and management of data quality risks as part of its overall risk management framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure include standards for both outsourced and in-house risk data-related processes, policies on data confidentiality, integrity and availability, as well
controls.control_description:
The framework should include standards for both
outsourced and in-house risk data-related processes, policies on data
confidentiality, integrity and availability, as well as risk management policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include standards for both outsourced and in-house risk data-related processes, policies on data confidentiality, integrity and availability, as well

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the impact of such activities on the data aggregation and reporting
controls.control_description:
While considering any acquisition / divestiture, new product development,
IT Change initiatives etc, the due diligence process should consider the
impact of such activities on the data aggregation and reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the impact of such activities on the data aggregation and reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that data aggregation and reporting facilities are integrated within the existing reporting framework within a timeframe
controls.control_description:
In such
cases, it should be ensured that data aggregation and reporting facilities are
integrated within the existing reporting framework within a timeframe.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be ensured that data aggregation and reporting facilities are integrated within the existing reporting framework within a timeframe

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that ability of the se to aggregate and report data at a consolidated level or at any relevant level within the organisation is not hindered by
controls.control_description:
The Board and senior management shall ensure that ability of the SE to
aggregate and report data at a consolidated level or at any relevant level
within the organisation is not hindered by its group structure (eg sub-
consolidated level, jurisdiction of operation level).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to ensure that ability of the se to aggregate and report data at a consolidated level or at any relevant level within the organisation is not hindered by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be independent from the choices a se makes regarding its legal organisation and geographical presence
controls.control_description:
In particular data
aggregation and reporting should be independent from the choices a SE
makes regarding its legal organisation and geographical presence, subject
to the statutory limitations, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be independent from the choices a se makes regarding its legal organisation and geographical presence

controls.control_objective: To ensure design, build and maintain the data architecture and supporting it infrastructure for accurate, complete and timely data aggregation and reporting not
controls.control_description:
A SE shall design, build and maintain the data architecture and supporting
IT infrastructure for accurate, complete and timely data aggregation and
reporting not only in normal times but also during times of stress or crisis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to design, build and maintain the data architecture and supporting it infrastructure for accurate, complete and timely data aggregation and reporting not

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered an essential part of the se's business continuity planning process and subject to a business impact analysis
controls.control_description:
The data aggregation and reporting practices should be considered an
essential part of the SE's business continuity planning process and subject
to a business impact analysis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered an essential part of the se's business continuity planning process and subject to a business impact analysis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established among business owners and it team so as to ensure that the data is kept current and aligned with the data definitions and with the ses
controls.control_description:
Roles and responsibilities should be established among business owners
and IT team so as to ensure that the data is kept current and aligned with
the data definitions and with the SEs data reporting policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established among business owners and it team so as to ensure that the data is kept current and aligned with the data definitions and with the ses

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that resources and it infrastructure is adequate to meet a broad range of on-demand, ad hoc reporting requests, including requests during stres
controls.control_description:
SEs should ensure that resources and IT infrastructure is adequate to meet
a broad range of on-demand, ad hoc reporting requests, including requests
during stress / crises situation and to meet supervisory queries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that resources and it infrastructure is adequate to meet a broad range of on-demand, ad hoc reporting requests, including requests during stres

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to accurately aggregate data on exposure for a particular period for a specific industry cluster in a district
controls.control_description:
For example, the SE should be able to accurately aggregate data
on exposure for a particular period for a specific industry cluster in a district.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be able to accurately aggregate data on exposure for a particular period for a specific industry cluster in a district

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reconciled with ses own sources, including accounting data where appropriate, to ensure accuracy and completeness of the same
controls.control_description:
All returns / risk reports should be reconciled with SEs own sources,
including accounting data where appropriate, to ensure accuracy and
completeness of the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reconciled with ses own sources, including accounting data where appropriate, to ensure accuracy and completeness of the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure strive to achieve a higher degree of automation in generation of data for filing of returns
controls.control_description:
SEs should strive to achieve a higher degree of automation in generation of
data for filing of returns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strive to achieve a higher degree of automation in generation of data for filing of returns

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain proper records of sources and aggregation rules for generating returns' data
controls.control_description:
SEs shall maintain proper records of sources and aggregation rules for
generating returns' data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain proper records of sources and aggregation rules for generating returns' data

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the applicable returns as given in annex iii, with accurate and complete data, strictly within the prescribed timelines
controls.control_description:
Timelines for filing of Returns: SEs shall submit the applicable returns as given
in Annex III, with accurate and complete data, strictly within the prescribed timelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the applicable returns as given in annex iii, with accurate and complete data, strictly within the prescribed timelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be filed within 5 working days from the date of signing of the auditor's report in terms of section 134 of the companies act, 2013 (solo/ group level
controls.control_description:
The principles for the same is tabulated below:
Periodicity Reference Date Timeline for Return Submission
Weekly Friday of the week On or before Wednesday of the following week
15th and Last day (28th/ 29th/ 30th/ 31st) of the respective month
Within 7 days from the Reference Date
Fortnightly
Last day (28th/ 29th/ 30th/ 31st) of a respective month
Within 15 days from the Reference Date
Monthly
Last day of the Calendar Quarter (i.e., March 31st, June 30th, September 30th, and December 31st)
Within 21 days from the Reference Date
Quarterly
Half yearly March 31st, and September 30th
Within 21 days from the Reference Date
Yearly March 31st Within 21 days from the Reference Date Note:
1) All audited returns, wherever applicable, shall be filed within 5 working days from the date of signing of the Auditor's report in terms of section 134 of the Companies Act, 2013 (solo/ group level as per applicability of the return), as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be filed within 5 working days from the date of signing of the auditor's report in terms of section 134 of the companies act, 2013 (solo/ group level

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted within the timelines as indicated in the communication issued by the rbi
controls.control_description: 2) All ad-hoc returns/ data must be submitted within the timelines as indicated in the communication issued by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted within the timelines as indicated in the communication issued by the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure introduce new returns / withdraw existing returns (both ad-hoc/ regular) for submission by ses and inform such entities suitably
controls.control_description:
Ad-Hoc / Additional Returns: The RBI may introduce new returns / withdraw
existing returns (both ad-hoc/ regular) for submission by SEs and inform such entities
suitably.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to introduce new returns / withdraw existing returns (both ad-hoc/ regular) for submission by ses and inform such entities suitably

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit all the returns through online mode in the formats and in the manner as communicated to them (see annex iii)
controls.control_description:
Mode of submission of Returns: SEs shall submit all the returns through online
mode in the formats and in the manner as communicated to them (See Annex III),
unless specified otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit all the returns through online mode in the formats and in the manner as communicated to them (see annex iii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted (i.e., would not be deemed to have been submitted by ses)
controls.control_description:
Returns submitted in hard copy format through hand
delivery/ post/ courier, or in soft copy format through e-mails, shall not be accepted
(i.e., would not be deemed to have been submitted by SEs), unless prescribed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted (i.e., would not be deemed to have been submitted by ses)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be advised to submit the returns through email
controls.control_description:
As a
contingency measure, in case of non-availability of on-line portals, SEs may be
advised to submit the returns through email.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be advised to submit the returns through email

controls.control_objective: To ensure re-submit the return through online mode soon after its availability
controls.control_description:
However, SEs shall re-submit the return
through online mode soon after its availability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to re-submit the return through online mode soon after its availability

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish the correct and true information in the returns prescribed in the directions within the stipulated timelines
controls.control_description:
Penalties: All the SEs shall furnish the correct and true information in the returns
prescribed in the Directions within the stipulated timelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish the correct and true information in the returns prescribed in the directions within the stipulated timelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure take necessary action including imposition of a penalty / fine under the extant provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of
controls.control_description:
In case any SE is found in
violation of these Directions, the Reserve Bank may take necessary action including
imposition of a penalty / fine under the extant provisions of the Banking Regulation
Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Securitization and
Reconstruction of Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002,
as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take necessary action including imposition of a penalty / fine under the extant provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of

controls.control_objective: To ensure , insofar as it is not inconsistent with the provisions of these directions, be deemed to have been done or taken under the corresponding provisions o
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the abovementioned repeals, anything done, or any action taken
or purported to have been done or taken, or any direction given, or any proceeding
taken or any penalty or fine imposed under the repealed enactments shall, insofar as
it is not inconsistent with the provisions of these Directions, be deemed to have been
done or taken under the corresponding provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , insofar as it is not inconsistent with the provisions of these directions, be deemed to have been done or taken under the corresponding provisions o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted within in 21 days
controls.control_description: Returns for the quarter ending months i.e., June, September, December and March may be submitted within in 21 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted within in 21 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted within 15 days
controls.control_description: Returns for all the months shall be submitted within 15 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted within 15 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure nominate a senior officer (of rank of general manager or equivalent) to coordinate the compilation of the data and to be return name existing guidelin
controls.control_description:
Local Area Banks (LABs) - Designating officials responsible for correct and timely submission of data
'Two senior officials may be designated who would be responsible for the correct compilation and timely submission of the returns and who
LABs shall nominate a senior officer (of rank of General Manager or equivalent) to coordinate the compilation of the data and to be
Return Name Existing guidelines Revised guidelines would be fully responsible for the information furnished therein.'
responsible to the Reserve Bank for submission of the returns in time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to nominate a senior officer (of rank of general manager or equivalent) to coordinate the compilation of the data and to be return name existing guidelin

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise of four layers
controls.control_description:
Changes in NBFCs' Returns applicability as per Scale Based Regulations
(SBR)
As per RBI's notification DoR.FIN.REC.No.45/03.10.119/2023-24 dated October 19,
2023 (Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Company -
Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2023), the Regulatory structure for NBFCs shall
comprise of four layers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise of four layers

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 17, 2003

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 04, 2005

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 26, 2004

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported irrespective of the percentage of such exposure to bank's capital funds
controls.control_description:
In section 2, all
borrower groups having total exposure in excess of 30 % of bank's capital funds
or a minimum of fifty large borrower groups should be reported irrespective of the
percentage of such exposure to bank's capital funds;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported irrespective of the percentage of such exposure to bank's capital funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a 'nil' return
controls.control_description:
In case, any entity to whom the
return is applicable does not have any borrower with aggregate exposure of ₹5
crores and above for a reporting month, it shall submit a 'NIL' return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a 'nil' return

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a 'nil' return
controls.control_description:
In case, any entity to whom the return is applicable
does not have any large borrower with default move-in/ move-out positions during
the week, it shall submit a 'NIL' return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a 'nil' return

controls.control_objective: To ensure exclude group companies which are engaged in (a) insurance business and (b) businesses not pertaining to financial services
controls.control_description:
For reporting in CPR, the consolidation may exclude group
companies which are engaged in (a) insurance business and (b) Businesses not
pertaining to financial services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exclude group companies which are engaged in (a) insurance business and (b) businesses not pertaining to financial services

controls.control_objective: To ensure to upload the details of branches allocated to their sbas, on an annual basis, in the auditor allocation system (aas) application maintained by the ba
controls.control_description:
Allocation of branches to Statutory Branch Auditors (SBAs) by Public Sector
Banks (PSBs): Public Sector Banks are required to upload the details of branches
allocated to their SBAs, on an annual basis, in the Auditor Allocation System (AAS)
application maintained by the Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to upload the details of branches allocated to their sbas, on an annual basis, in the auditor allocation system (aas) application maintained by the ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure to conduct half yearly/quarterly review of their accounts
controls.control_description:
Half yearly/ Quarterly Review of Accounts of Public Sector Banks - Review
Report by Statutory Central Auditors (SCAs): Statutory Central Auditors of
PSBs are required to conduct half yearly/quarterly review of their accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to conduct half yearly/quarterly review of their accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit the information on half yearly/quarterly review of their accounts as per the prescribed format
controls.control_description:
Half yearly/ Quarterly Review of Accounts of Public Sector Banks - Review
of Accounts: Public Sector Banks are required to submit the information on half
yearly/quarterly review of their accounts as per the prescribed format.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit the information on half yearly/quarterly review of their accounts as per the prescribed format

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a 'nil' return
controls.control_description:
In case, any
entity to whom the return is applicable does not have any borrower with aggregate
exposure of ₹5 crores and above for a reporting month, it shall submit a 'NIL'
return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a 'nil' return

controls.control_description:
Applicable NBFCs shall submit the
following two ALM returns:

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a 'nil' return
controls.control_description:
In case, any entity to whom the return is applicable
does not have any borrower with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crores and above for
a reporting month, it shall submit a 'NIL' return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a 'nil' return

controls.control_objective: To ensure report certain information on large borrowers (having aggregate exposure of ₹5 crores and above with them), who have defaulted during a week or moved
controls.control_description:
DNBS09 - CRILC Weekly Return on Defaulted Borrowers (RDB)- NBFCs may
report certain information on large borrowers (having aggregate exposure of ₹5
crores and above with them), who have defaulted during a week or moved out of
the default position, through this return on each Friday.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report certain information on large borrowers (having aggregate exposure of ₹5 crores and above with them), who have defaulted during a week or moved

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a 'nil' return
controls.control_description:
In case, any entity to whom
the return is applicable does not have any large borrower with default move-in/
move-out positions during the week, it shall submit a 'NIL' return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a 'nil' return

controls.control_objective: To ensure enable their statutory auditors to submit 'dnbs10 - statutory auditor's certificate (sac) return' every year
controls.control_description:
DNBS10 -Statutory Auditor's Certificate (SAC) - Yearly Return: All NBFCs and
ARCs shall enable their Statutory Auditors to submit 'DNBS10 - Statutory Auditor's
Certificate (SAC) Return' every year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to enable their statutory auditors to submit 'dnbs10 - statutory auditor's certificate (sac) return' every year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on audited books of accounts of the applicable entity, for the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
The certificate shall be based on audited
books of accounts of the applicable entity, for the preceding financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on audited books of accounts of the applicable entity, for the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure compile, generate and file the return, using the secure login credentials created by the applicable entity
controls.control_description:
The Statutory Auditor shall compile, generate and file the return, using the secure
login credentials created by the applicable entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to compile, generate and file the return, using the secure login credentials created by the applicable entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit information on their overseas investment and returns on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
DNBS13 - Overseas Investment Return: All the NBFCs (irrespective of category,
business classification and asset size) shall submit information on their overseas
investment and returns on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit information on their overseas investment and returns on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted
controls.control_description:
In case, there are no overseas
investments during the reporting quarter, a 'NIL' return shall be submitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue be submitted in hard copy, or, through e-mails as prescribed, till provisions are made for submission of these returns through online portals
controls.control_description:
Form A Certificate - All NBFCs
These returns may continue be submitted in hard copy, or, through e-mails as
prescribed, till provisions are made for submission of these returns through online
portals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue be submitted in hard copy, or, through e-mails as prescribed, till provisions are made for submission of these returns through online portals
